fields.label: API Token
fields.helpText: From Toggl Track -> Profile -> Profile settings -> API Token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API token via Toggl Track /me endpoint using HTTP Basic auth

metadata.summary: Toggl Track time tracking with one-click timers, projects, clients, and reports.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to Toggl Track at track.toggl.com
2. Click your profile avatar (bottom left) -> Profile settings
3. Scroll to the 'API Token' section
4. Click 'Click to reveal' and copy the token
5. Paste it here. Auth is HTTP Basic with username=<token> and password='api_token'.
